category.description: Brainwave entrainment protocols aligned with the five dungeons and seven chapters of Inversion Excursion. Each protocol targets specific consciousness states for navigating credentials, finance, language, religion, science, and self-liberation.
category.author: knowurknot
category.book_reference: Inversion Excursion: A Frequency Warrior's Guide

protocol_id.description: IE-01 to IE-07 (chapters), IE-D2 to IE-D5 (dungeons), IE-EM1 to IE-EM3 (emergency)

carrier.description: Solfeggio and extended frequencies in Hz

entrainment.description: Brainwave frequencies: Theta, Schumann, Alpha, Gamma

carrier_secondary.description: Optional second carrier for dual-frequency protocols

chapter.description: Associated book chapter, null for dungeon-only protocols

dungeon.description: Associated dungeon (2-5), null for chapter-only protocols
